problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: If Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
